description: Ability to find the top-1 best-selling product type for a given quarter and year on the shopping_admin site. Requires admin login and navigation to sales report.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template:
1. Navigate to the shopping admin home page.
2. Log in with administrator credentials.
3. Go to the sales or performance report section.
4. Set the date range to cover {quarter} {year} (e.g., from {start_date} to {end_date}).
5. Sort product types by total sales quantity or revenue descending.
6. Extract the name of the top product type.
7. Return the product type name.

quarter.description: Quarter label, e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4

product_type.description: Name of the top-selling product type

postconditions: The top-selling product type is identified and returned
No side effects on the system state
preconditions: User must have admin credentials for the shopping_admin site
Date range for the specified quarter and year must exist in the system

name: find_top_selling_product_type_by_quarter_trajectory_webarena_03_2

challenges.expected_evidence: Output is a single product type name that matches the top seller in Q3 2022.
challenges.failure_signal: Returns any product type that is not the top seller, or fails to filter by correct quarter, or returns multiple types.
rubric: Correctly identifies the top-selling product type
Sorts by total sales quantity or revenue descending
Returns only the product type name
challenges.task: Find the top-selling product type in Quarter 3 2022 on the shopping_admin site.

challenges.expected_evidence: Output is the name of the top-selling category.
challenges.failure_signal: Returns a product type instead of category, or wrong quarter, or incorrect sorting.
rubric: Identifies the top-selling product category (not type)
challenges.task: Find the top-selling product category in Quarter 1 2022 on the shopping_admin site.

challenges.expected_evidence: Output is the top product type for Q1 2023.
challenges.failure_signal: Returns result for Q1 2022 or any other quarter, or fails to adjust year.
rubric: Handles any year difference from the original context
challenges.task: Find the top-selling product type in Quarter 1 2023 on the shopping_admin site.

constraints: Must be logged in with admin credentials
Must use the correct date range for Q1 2022
Focus is on product type, not individual products
Data must be from the shopping_admin site
facts: Top-selling product type for Q1 2022 is needed
Task involves WebArena shopping_admin site with login required
Admin credentials are used to access reports
procedures: Go to the shopping admin home page
Log in with valid administrator credentials
Navigate to the product sales or performance report section
Filter or select the date range for Quarter 1 of 2022 (e.g., 2022-01-01 to 2022-03-31)
Sort or identify the product type with the highest total sales quantity or revenue
Record or return the name of the top-selling product type
context_pack.summary: Task to find top-1 best-selling product type in Quarter 1 2022 on the WebArena shopping_admin site. Requires admin login, navigation to a sales report section, filtering by the date range for Q1 2022, sorting product types by total sales quantity or revenue, and extracting the top product type name.
